message:
feat(analytics): add tools raw-source fallback, clean up legacy UI stubs, and remove dead code

Three parallel workstreams closing stub/placeholder issues:

**Analytics tools raw-source fallback (query.rs, types.rs, lib.rs, tests):**
Add query_tools_from_raw() — queries messages + message_metrics directly
when pre-aggregated tables lack data. Extract the repeated inline
source_id/origin_host normalization into a shared
normalized_analytics_source_identity_value() helper, deduplicating
identical blocks from two call sites. Add track_a_tools_supports_raw_source_fallback()
capability probe. Expose _meta.source_table in docs. Full integration
test with fixture seeding for the fallback path.

**Legacy UI shell clarification (tui.rs, help_strip.rs, widgets.rs, ui/mod.rs, components/mod.rs):**
Update doc comments on three legacy stub files to clarify they are
intentional comment-only shells (not pending implementations). Add
compile-time size_of tests asserting canonical types live outside the
legacy shells, preventing accidental duplication.

**Dead code removal (update_check.rs, encryption.rs):**
Remove dismiss_update() stub function; add regression test confirming
UpdateState remains correct without it. Add encrypt_content test
verifying authenticated-ciphertext properties, closing the stale
placeholder doc complaint.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -5956,6 +5956,7 @@ fn render_analytics_docs() -> Vec<String> {
         "  data.totals: { tool_call_count, message_count, api_tokens_total,".into(),
         "                 overall_per_1k_api_tokens }".into(),
         "  data.row_count: int".into(),
+        "  data._meta.source_table: (\'usage_daily\' | \'usage_hourly\' | \'message_metrics\')".into(),
         "  --limit N (default 20): caps returned rows".into(),
         String::new(),
         "### analytics models".into(),

@@ -1,4 +1,5 @@
-//! Contextual help strip types.
+//! Retained legacy help-strip shell module.
 //!
-//! Legacy ratatui rendering has been removed.
-//! The ftui equivalent lives in `src/ui/app.rs`.
+//! The active FTUI help and hint surfaces live in [`crate::ui::app`] and the
+//! upstream `ftui` widgets it composes. This file is intentionally comment-only
+//! while file deletion remains gated by project policy.

@@ -1,4 +1,5 @@
-//! Premium UI widgets.
+//! Retained legacy widget shell module.
 //!
-//! Legacy ratatui rendering functions have been removed.
-//! The ftui equivalents live directly in `src/ui/app.rs`.
+//! The active FTUI-era widget behavior lives in [`crate::ui::app`] and the
+//! neighboring component modules. This file is intentionally comment-only while
+//! file deletion remains gated by project policy.

@@ -1,4 +1,5 @@
-//! Legacy ratatui-based TUI.
+//! Retained legacy UI shell module.
 //!
-//! All rendering has been migrated to the ftui framework in `app.rs`.
-//! This module is retained as a stub to avoid breaking `mod.rs` declarations.
+//! The production FTUI application lives in [`crate::ui::app`]. This file is
+//! intentionally comment-only and remains in-tree only because file deletion is
+//! gated by project policy. It is not a pending implementation surface.
